Paragraph
In component notation, this is
\begin{equation*} D_{i}(g_{k}\circ f)(\bx_{0})=\sum_{j=1}^{m}D_{j}g_{k} \circ f (\bx_{0}) D_{i}f_{j}(\bx_{0})= \sum_{j=1}^{m} D_{j}g_{k} ( f (\bx_{0})) D_{i}f_{j}(\bx_{0}), \end{equation*}
or
\begin{equation*} \frac{\partial (g_{k}\circ f)}{\partial x_{i}}(\bx_{0})=\sum_{j=1}^{m} \frac{\partial g_{k}}{\partial y_{j}}( f (\bx_{0})) \frac{\partial f_{j}}{\partial x_{i}}(\bx_{0}). \end{equation*}
in-context
